broadcasts.text: Good morning colleagues! Please note that the main server maintenance is scheduled for today from 6 PM to 8 PM. Please save all your ongoing genomic data runs.
Happy to announce that Dr. Sunita Sharma has been awarded the prestigious ICMR Best Scientist Award for Virology research! Congratulations Dr. Sunita! 👏🌟
